name: Plumbing, Heating and Air-Conditioning Contractors
rationale: Strongest VN position (10.00) as the contractor is a direct buyer with short sales cycle. Low constraint risk (9.50). Incumbent vulnerability modest (5.60) since portable clamp-on meters are complementary rather than directly competitive; Marquardt creates a permanent-inline category adjacent to spot-check tools.
entryStrategy: 1) Target 5-10 DACH TGA service firms in hydronic commissioning. 2) Prove <2s flow-response latency on zone-valve adjustment. 3) Bundle as permanent inline add-on to EcoDesign commissioning kits. 4) Channel via wholesale (GC, Richter+Frenzel) and certified-contractor networks. 5) Cross-sell to smart-HVAC IoT platforms.
